The daily letter.
3. Commissioner, Divyang Welfare, Pune. Letter dated 07.11.2025 (1527788).
The memo: -

Reference No. 1 to the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of salaries and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities. The directions have been issued vide Government Circular No.1 dated 13th September, 2022 in Reference No. Instructions have been issued for scrutiny and submission of proposals as per the Scrutiny List prescribed vide letter dated 27.09.2023.

Accordingly, as per the non-payment proposal of Shri Gajanan Maharaj Residential Matimand Vidyalaya, Karla Road, District Wardha run by Prabhu Vishwakarma Rural Institute of Multi-Purpose Education, Wardha received by the Department from the Commissioner, Divyang Kalyan, Pune, the following funds are being disbursed for grant-in-aid (Programme), 31-Auxiliary Grants (Non-Payment) to Non-Governmental Organizations working for individuals belonging to Matimand category.
(Amount in thousands)
